summary: Completed testing of Admin Login, Admin Dashboard sidebar icons, and PesaPal subscription APIs. All core features working correctly. Admin login with email/password works, sidebar icons render properly as Lucide SVG components, and PesaPal checkout generates valid URLs for basic plan. Premium/Enterprise plans fail due to PesaPal account transaction limit (not a code bug).

minor.issue: PesaPal rejects amounts >9999 TZS with 'amount_exceeds_limit' error. This is a PesaPal account configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/dashboard/navigation - returns navigation items with icons
Backend: GET /api/subscription/plans - returns 3 plans (basic, premium, enterprise) with TZS prices
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout - basic plan returns valid PesaPal URL
Frontend: /login shows 'Admin Login' link at bottom with Shield icon
Frontend: Admin Login link navigates to /admin/login
Frontend: /admin/login has email/password form with proper data-testids
Frontend: /admin/login has 'Back to Teacher Login' link
Frontend: Admin login with valid credentials redirects to /admin/dashboard
Frontend: Admin login with invalid credentials shows error message
Frontend: Back to Teacher Login link navigates to /login
Frontend: Admin dashboard sidebar shows 11 navigation items with Lucide SVG icons
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows overview cards (Total Users, Active Users, Blocked Users, Revenue)
action_items: EXTERNAL: PesaPal account has transaction limit of 9999 TZS. Contact PesaPal to increase limit for premium (19999) and enterprise (29999) plans.

success_rate.backend: 82% (9 passed, 2 failed due to PesaPal account limit)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin credentials from test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin login flow fully working with email/password. Admin dashboard sidebar icons properly mapped to Lucide components. PesaPal checkout works for basic plan (9999 TZS) but fails for premium/enterprise due to PesaPal account transaction limit - this is an external configuration issue, not a code bug. Subscribe page and PaymentSettings require Google OAuth authentication which cannot be tested via automation.
pesapal_note: PesaPal production keys work correctly for basic plan. Premium and Enterprise plans fail with 'amount_exceeds_limit' error - this requires PesaPal account configuration change, not code fix.
